signals.title: NZD/USD — G10 Bilateral Theme + Hawkish Fed Divergence
signals.text: NZD is the G10 laggard (-1.692% 1W avg) against the USD leader (+0.771% 1W avg), creating a 2.464% spread; this strong bilateral theme sets up NZD/USD downside pressure. The hawkish Fed narrative, with the Fed removing easing bias from its statement, reinforces USD strength against NZD's mildly accommodative real rate (-0.83%). The next RBNZ meeting (mkt: 83% hike priced) on 8 Jul is the catalyst for any shift in the RBNZ's hike bias.
evidence: Fed Removed This 1 Key Phrase From the Inflation Report (18:25)

signals.title: USD/JPY — Crowded Short Squeeze Risk + Yield Divergence
signals.text: JPY COT net short -115,033 (28.4% long) is an extreme crowded short position, creating short-squeeze risk (USD/JPY downside if shorts cover) for USD/JPY. This positioning runs against the substantial +266bp carry advantage favoring USD (SOFR 3.64% vs TONA 0.98%) and the hawkish Fed narrative. The next BoJ meeting (mkt: 100% hold priced) on 31 Jul is the catalyst for any shift in the yield gap or JPY's accommodative real rate (-0.52%).
evidence: Hawkish Fed Bets Hit Silver as Hormuz Risk Returns (14:37)

signals.title: AUD/USD — Crowded Long Unwind Risk + Negative CESI
signals.text: AUD COT net long +29,035 (64.9% long) creates crowded-long unwind risk for AUD/USD, which closed 0.6901 Friday. This is exacerbated by AUD's neutral CESI score (+0) and the strong USD momentum (+0.771% 1W avg). The next RBA meeting (mkt: 100% hold priced) on 11 Aug determines whether the current mildly restrictive real rate (+0.17%) can sustain the bid against USD strength.

signals.title: EUR/USD — Negative CESI + Moderate Put Skew
signals.text: EUR's moderate negative CESI score (-5 misses) indicates data is consistently disappointing expectations, suggesting a fundamental headwind for EUR/USD. This aligns with a moderate put skew (-0.59 1M 25d RR) in options markets, indicating a bias for EUR weakness. The next ECB meeting (mkt: 100% hold priced) on 23 Jul is the catalyst for any change in the mildly restrictive real rate (+0.08%).
